LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STERLING ENVIRONMENTAL CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDING PENDING MEDIATION AND ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE ALTERNATE DISPUTE RESOLUTION PROCESS IN PARAGRAPH 39 OF THEIR CONTRACT. THE CASE IS STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THAT PROCESS. REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEE IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MEAGAN J. WILSON OF HERRIG & VOGT, LLP, TEL. NO. (916) 960-1000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LAURA E. COOMBE & ATTY. A. BROOKS GRESHAM (COURT CALL) OF MCGUIRE WOODS LLP, TEL. NO. (310) 315-8274 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SF HILTON LLC;

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT S.F. HILTON LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar as moot in light of the ruling on plaintiff's motion to stay proceeding. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MEAGAN J. WILSON OF HERRIG & VOGT, LLP, TEL. NO. (916) 960-1000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LAURA E. COOMBE & ATTY. A. BROOKS GRESHAM (COURT CALL) OF MCGUIRE WOODS LLP, TEL. NO. (310) 315-8274 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SF HILTON LLC;

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF STERLING ENVIRONMENTAL CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDING PENDING MEDIATION AND ARBITRATION is Granted. The parties are ordered to comply with the alternate dispute resolution process in paragraph 39 of their contract. The case is stayed pending the conclusion of that process. Request for attorney's fee is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS
